product_overview: An intelligent FastAPI service that classifies user prompts and routes them to the most cost-effective LLM capable of handling them, with transparent escalation, streaming output, telemetry, and feedback for continual improvement.
core_goals: Automatically route prompts to the lowest-cost model that satisfies quality constraints to maximize inference cost savings.
Maintain response quality by detecting low-confidence outputs and transparently escalating to higher-capability models.
Provide blocking and streaming APIs for integration flexibility and real-time UX.
Log full request/response metadata to PostgreSQL for observability, cost accounting, and dashboarding.
Expose metrics and a feedback loop (thumbs up/down) for monitoring model quality and enabling future improvements.

features.name: Health Check API
features.description: Lightweight endpoint to verify overall system health, including database connectivity and classifier availability.
user_flows: GET /v1/health -> Receive 200 with {"status":"ok","db":"ok","classifier":"ok"}
GET /v1/health -> Database connection attempt fails -> Receive 200 with {"status":"degraded","db":"error","classifier":"ok"}

features.name: Blocking Chat API
features.description: Single-request blocking chat endpoint that classifies the prompt, routes to an appropriate LLM, optionally escalates on low-confidence, logs the request, and returns the final response and routing metadata.
user_flows: POST /v1/chat with valid X-API-Key and JSON body {"prompt":"What is the capital of France?"} -> Classifier (Together AI SDK) classify(prompt) returns difficulty_tag 'simple' -> Router selects simple-tier model 'claude-haiku-4-5' -> Anthropic SDK call to claude-haiku-4-5 returns text response -> Database INSERT request record with model_used/cost/latency -> Receive 200 with {response, model_used, difficulty_tag, cost_usd, latency_ms, escalated:false}
POST /v1/chat without X-API-Key -> Receive 403 invalid_api_key

POST /v1/chat with valid X-API-Key and JSON body {"prompt":"Short prompt"} -> Classifier returns 'simple' -> Anthropic SDK call fails due to missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or auth error -> Router escalates or returns error depending on escalation logic -> If escalation not possible or escalation call fails, Receive 500 internal_error

features.name: Streaming Chat API
features.description: Streams newline-delimited JSON frames (metadata, token events, done/error) over a single connection while performing the same classification, routing, and escalation logic as the blocking chat endpoint.
user_flows: POST /v1/chat/stream with valid X-API-Key and JSON body {"prompt":"Explain quantum entanglement"} -> Classifier (Together AI SDK) classify(prompt) returns 'simple' -> Router selects 'claude-haiku-4-5' -> Server opens text/event-stream and emits metadata frame {type:metadata,...} -> Server emits multiple token frames {type:token,...} as tokens arrive from LLM -> Server emits done frame {type:done,...} and closes stream

POST /v1/chat/stream with valid X-API-Key and JSON body {"prompt":"Edge case"} -> Classifier returns 'simple' -> Initial LLM returns low-confidence marker detected by Escalation Engine -> Server emits first metadata frame for initial model then emits second metadata frame for escalated model -> Server streams token frames from escalated model -> Server emits done frame with escalated:true
POST /v1/chat/stream without X-API-Key -> Receive 403 invalid_api_key
POST /v1/chat/stream with valid X-API-Key -> Rate limiter triggers (shared IP) -> Receive 429 rate limit exceeded

features.name: Stats API
features.description: Provides aggregate telemetry (total requests, cost totals, cost savings, model usage breakdown, escalation rate, and hourly savings time series) to power the dashboard and reporting.
user_flows: GET /v1/stats with valid X-API-Key -> Query aggregated metrics from PostgreSQL -> Receive 200 with {total_requests, total_cost_usd, total_cost_saved_usd, model_usage, escalation_rate, savings_ts}
GET /v1/stats without X-API-Key -> Receive 403 invalid_api_key
GET /v1/stats with valid X-API-Key -> Database aggregation query fails due to DB error -> Receive 500 internal_error

features.name: Recent Requests API
features.description: Returns the most recent logged requests for dashboard tables and quick inspection, with configurable page size.
user_flows: GET /v1/recent?limit=20 with valid X-API-Key -> Database SELECT ordered by created_at desc -> Receive 200 with array of recent request objects (created_at, difficulty_tag, model_used, cost_usd, cost_saved_usd, latency_ms, escalated)
GET /v1/recent?limit=5 with valid X-API-Key -> Database connection or query error -> Receive 500 database error
GET /v1/recent without X-API-Key -> Receive 403 invalid_api_key

features.name: Feedback API
features.description: Accepts thumbs-up or thumbs-down feedback tied to a logged request_id to collect quality signals for monitoring and future model improvements.
user_flows: POST /v1/feedback with valid X-API-Key and JSON body {"request_id":42,"feedback":1} -> Validate request_id exists via DB lookup -> Insert feedback row and update aggregates -> Receive 200 {"ok":true}
POST /v1/feedback with valid X-API-Key and JSON body {"request_id":9999,"feedback":1} -> DB lookup fails to find request_id -> Receive 404 request_id not found
POST /v1/feedback with valid X-API-Key and JSON body {"request_id":42,"feedback":0} -> Server validation fails because feedback must be 1 or -1 -> Receive 400 feedback must be 1 or -1

features.name: Prompt Classifier
features.description: Classifies incoming prompts into difficulty tiers (simple / medium / complex) using the Together AI Gemma 3N model to inform routing decisions.
user_flows: POST /v1/chat with valid X-API-Key and JSON body {"prompt":"Summarize this article"} -> Server calls Together AI SDK classify(prompt) -> Together AI returns difficulty_tag 'medium' -> Router uses difficulty_tag to pick the medium-tier model and proceeds to LLM call

POST /v1/chat with valid X-API-Key and JSON body {"prompt":"Non-English prompt"} -> Server calls Together AI SDK classify(prompt) -> Together AI returns difficulty_tag 'simple' (or best-effort) -> Router proceeds accordingly

POST /v1/chat with valid X-API-Key -> Server calls Together AI SDK classify(prompt) -> Together AI API/network error or invalid TOGETHER_API_KEY -> Classifier fails -> Server returns 500 internal_error (classification unavailable)

features.name: Escalation Engine
features.description: Detects low-confidence LLM outputs via regex heuristics and automatically escalates the request to the next model tier (once) to preserve response quality.
user_flows: POST /v1/chat with valid X-API-Key and JSON body {"prompt":"Ask an ambiguous question"} -> Classifier selects 'simple' -> Simple-tier LLM returns text containing low-confidence phrases (e.g., "I don't know") -> Escalation Engine regex detects low-confidence -> Router calls medium-tier LLM -> Database logs both attempts and final response -> Receive 200 with escalated:true and model_used set to medium-tier

POST /v1/chat with valid X-API-Key -> Classifier selects 'medium' -> Medium-tier LLM returns confident response (no low-confidence tokens) -> Escalation Engine performs regex check and passes -> Final response returned with escalated:false

POST /v1/chat with valid X-API-Key -> Initial LLM returns low-confidence -> Escalation Engine triggers and calls next-tier LLM -> Next-tier LLM API experiences transient error and fails (no retry logic) -> Receive 500 internal_error (escalation failed due to transient LLM error)

features.name: Cost Calculator
features.description: Computes per-request cost and saved cost based on model selected and input/output token counts, and updates aggregates used by stats and billing dashboards.
user_flows: POST /v1/chat with valid X-API-Key -> LLM returns response with input_tokens and output_tokens counts -> cost.py computes cost_usd and cost_saved_usd based on model pricing -> Database UPDATE stores computed cost fields on the request record -> GET /v1/stats reflects updated totals and savings_ts includes the new entry

POST /v1/chat with valid X-API-Key -> LLM returns response but token counts are missing or malformed -> cost.py validation fails and returns null cost values -> Server logs request with null/placeholder cost fields and returns 200 response (administrative alert may be raised) -> GET /v1/stats shows incomplete/partial data for that request

tech_stack.other: Anthropic SDK, OpenAI SDK, Together AI SDK, SlowAPI rate limiter, python-dotenv

features.name: Health Check API
features.description: Returns system health including DB and classifier status

endpoints.description: Check health of database and classifier service

features.name: Blocking Chat API
features.description: Routes a user prompt to the appropriate LLM model based on difficulty classification, with optional escalation

endpoints.description: Send a prompt and receive a full response with model routing metadata

features.name: Streaming Chat API
features.description: Streams LLM response tokens with metadata frames using newline-delimited JSON (text/event-stream)

endpoints.description: Stream LLM response with routing metadata, token events, and final done frame

features.name: Stats API
features.description: Returns aggregate statistics about all requests processed

endpoints.description: Get total requests, costs, savings, model usage breakdown, escalation rate, and hourly savings time series

features.name: Recent Requests API
features.description: Returns the most recent requests for dashboard display

endpoints.description: Retrieve N most recent requests ordered by timestamp descending

features.name: Feedback API
features.description: Allows thumbs-up/down feedback on a specific request

endpoints.description: Submit +1 or -1 feedback for a logged request by ID

features.name: Prompt Classifier
features.description: Classifies prompts as simple/medium/complex using Together AI

features.name: Escalation Engine
features.description: Detects low-confidence responses via regex and escalates to the next model tier

features.name: Cost Calculator
features.description: Computes cost and cost savings per request based on model and token counts

known_limitations.issue: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not set, so claude-haiku-4-5 model calls will fail
known_limitations.impact: Requests routed to simple/haiku tier will error

known_limitations.issue: No retry logic on LLM calls
known_limitations.impact: Transient API errors cause immediate 500 responses

known_limitations.issue: Rate limiter uses per-IP; Streamlit Cloud shares one IP
known_limitations.impact: Rate limit may incorrectly throttle legitimate users on shared IPs
